column19: Scheme Twists in the Villain Deck

column2: King Hyperion Ruins the Perfect Wedding
column23: I was worried when King Hype pushed Nighthawk out of the city early on. But early scheme twists actually helped me get the rares for x-23 & Colossus&wolverine. Between Life & Death Incarnate, Hellfire cultists, & shapeshifted copycats, I KO'd enough to have a pretty nice Berserker deck. Hopefully this was good enough to make it to the final.

Was able to use upside down thinking early to get Hercules Rare and start the bystander ramp…I used Phoenix’s commons to dwindle down the deck and got a Dr of beat down along with berserk to put and end quickly to Hyperion….the other hand had a good crystal combo going but nothing beats Dr of beat down with all strength and tech deck

Controlled the city much easier than expected. Berkserking was DEFINITELY the route to go.  Captain Britain was a pretty solid choice. Crystal's "good" cards never even showed up, only her draw a card common.
